content:
Markov Chains

energy is provided through solar power and through the harnessing of gravitational forces that propel the solar system.

how to rectify multiple realities, similar to Rick and Morty

The original Metamorphoses was broken into 15 chapters, and has then been further broken down into 9 cycles by scholars—each section begins in chaos and results in order through metamorphosis.

Talk about the different cycles in Ovid and how I plan on repurposing them.

Oedipus - the start of the generational curse, the problem of human knowledge, and the inevitability of divine retribution - Ovid does not once mention Oedipus in the Metamorphoses.

Fama is a ‘person’ who sees and reports everything, but is her self invisible, an absent presence in the world over which she rules.

Chaos needs to come before everything else.

End with a prophecy - Julius soon to die, Augustus soon to rise — Augusts will be the one who restores order and power (and resets) the system to begin again.
